what_it_does: Defines a 24 by 24 SVG line icon showing a document with a folded corner and a small gear-like settings mark inside it.
observations: SVG uses no fill and strokes with currentColor.
The root viewBox, width, and height are all set for a 24 by 24 icon grid.
The document outline and folded corner are drawn in one path.
The gear motif is built from a small central circle plus short vertical, horizontal, and diagonal stroke segments.
Stroke width is 1.5 with round line caps and round joins.
standouts: Combines a file/document symbol with a compact settings/gear symbol.
Uses currentColor so the icon inherits surrounding text or UI color.
Keeps the entire icon as inline SVG geometry with no external assets.
conventions: Follows common stroke-icon conventions: 24px grid, currentColor, no fill, rounded caps, rounded joins.
Uses path commands and a circle rather than grouped semantic elements.
The file is minified onto a single line.
concerns: Single-line SVG markup is less convenient for manual review or editing.
The gear is represented by short strokes rather than a toothed outline, so its reading depends on small-scale stroke clarity.
notes: This is a reusable file-settings icon drawn as a simple currentColor stroke SVG.
questions: Was the compact gear intended to match a larger icon set's gear construction style?
Is the single-line formatting expected for all exported icons in this asset set?
purpose_vs_actual: The filename suggests a file-gear icon, and the SVG content matches that purpose by drawing a document with a gear/settings mark.
intention_signals: It seems intended to serve as a scalable UI icon for actions or states involving file configuration, file properties, or document settings.
novelty: The gear is compressed into a circle with small radial stroke marks inside the document instead of using a full toothed gear silhouette.
contribution: Contributes a neutral document-plus-settings visual substrate that a fused system could keep as an inherited-color, stroke-based icon for file configuration concepts.
summary_for_embedding: A 24px currentColor SVG stroke icon depicting a document with a folded corner and a small gear/settings symbol inside.
intention_for_embedding: This file was for representing file-related settings or configuration in a compact reusable icon asset.
